title: C919 E-TRAS — LGCU1 disagree (one channel inverted) → S0 hold
description: lgcu1:disagree flips LGCU1's MLG_WOW report to the opposite of LGCU2's. With both LGCUs marked valid but disagreeing, the §5.4 wow filter falls back to conservative AND of the valid channels — selected_mlg_wow=FALSE. State machine cannot leave S0_AIR_STOWED_LOCKED. Distinguished from c919_lgcu_invalid_blocks_deploy: in this fixture both validity bits are TRUE but the underlying signals disagree, exercising the disagree-handling branch rather than the both-invalid branch.

events.note: LGCU1 reports inverted MLG_WOW vs LGCU2 — both still valid → conservative FALSE
